description: Create an executable Python script named 'agent_reporter.py' in the home directory that queries the Wazuh API (https://localhost:55000) to retrieve all agents with 'status: active'. The script must authenticate using the JWT token endpoint with the provided credentials (User: wazuh-wui, Password: MyS3cr37P450r.*-) and export the results to 'active_agents.csv' with headers 'Agent ID,Hostname,IP Address,OS,Groups', joining multiple groups with a semicolon.
